backstory.original: Arkhan the Cruel is a dragonborn oathbreaker paladin in the service of the five-headed dragon goddess Tiamat. Due to 'The Wreath of the Prism' that he wears around his neck, he has gained control of the vicious manticore Chango.
backstory.display: 残暴者阿克汉是一位龙裔破誓者圣武士，为五头龙女神提亚马特效忠。由于脖子上戴着的“棱镜花环”，他获得了对邪恶蝎尾狮昌戈的控制。

description.original: Arkhan attacks the closest enemy with the fury of Tiamat.
description.display: 阿克汉使用提亚马特之怒攻击距离最近的敌人。

description.original: Arkhan breaths deadly dragon fire on a cone of enemies.
description.display: 阿克汉对锥形范围的敌人喷吐致命龙息。

longDescription.original: Arkhan rushes forward to the nearest enemy and breaths dragon fire on them and all enemies in a large cone.
longDescription.display: 阿克汉快速冲向距离最近的敌人，并向其身后锥形大范围内所有敌人喷吐龙息。

description.desc: When 6+ Enemies are attacking $source, his base attack gains a small cleave and does 5x damage. When 16+ Enemies are attacking, his base attack is a massive flame breath attack that does 25x damage. Counts each enemy enrage stack as an additional attacker.$only_when_purchased (Current Attackers: $num_attacking_monsters)
当 6 名以上敌人正在攻击$source时，他的基本攻击获得小顺势斩效果，并造成 5 倍伤害。如果有 16 名以上敌人向他攻击，则他的基本攻击化为强烈的烈焰呼吸，造成 25 倍伤害。每名敌人造成的怒气堆叠都被视为额外的攻击者。$only_when_purchased（当前攻击者人数：$num_attacking_monsters）

tipText.original: Arkhan attacks more ferociously when there are more enemies attacking him. Place him in your front line!
tipText.display: 更多阿克汉的敌人越多，他的攻击就越凶残。将他放置在你的前线！

description.desc: Increases the Health of all other Champions by $amount% of $source's Max Health
提高所有其他勇士的生命值，数值相当于$source最大生命值的 $amount%。
All positional Formation Abilities $target receives are buffed by $amount% if $target is in the front column of the formation (base 50%)
如果$target处于阵型前列，则所有作用于$target的阵型技能强化 $amount%（基础值为 50%）

specializationDescription.original: Arkhan increases the effect of formation abilities affecting him through sheer force of will.
specializationDescription.display: 阿克汉通过纯粹的意志力来强化影响他的阵型技能效果。

tipText.original: Arkhan increases the affect of formation abilities targeting him. Buff him up to take advantage of this effect!
tipText.display: 阿克汉会强化以他为目标的阵型技能效果。充分利用这个效果为他施加增益！

description.desc: $target receives (at $amount% rate) all positional Formation Abilities received by adjacent Champions that don't already target $target (base 50%)
$target有 $amount% 几率获得相邻勇士所获得的未以$target为目标的阵型技能效果（基础值为 50%）

specializationDescription.original: Arkhan taps into the power of Tiamat to "borrow" formation abilities affecting other Champions adjacent to him.
specializationDescription.display: 阿克汉利用提亚马特的力量“借用”影响其身边其他勇士的阵型技能。

tipText.original: Arkhan is also affected by some formation abilities affecting champions adjacent to him. Build your formation accordingly.
tipText.display: 某些影响阿克汉身边勇士的阵型技能也会影响到他，请据此构建你的阵型。

description.desc: Increases the damage of evil champions by $amount% for each enemy attacking $target and/or each enemy enrage stack.
每有一名攻击$target或使其堆叠怒气的敌人，即提升邪恶阵营勇士 $amount% 伤害
$target attacks $amount seconds sooner for each other Dark Order member in the formation
阵型中每有一位黑暗教团其他成员，$target攻击加速 $amount 秒

description.original: Only four to deal with? I only work in fives.
description.display: 只有四个人？至少五个人才够我打。

description.original: Chango, hold them down so I can chop off their arm!
description.display: 昌戈，按住他们，我来砍断他们的胳膊！

description.original: Nobody scratches Arkhan the Cruel!
description.display: 没人能伤残暴者阿克汉一根汗毛！

description.original: With this hand, I shall rule Avernus with my queen at my side!
description.display: 有了这只手，我将和我的皇后共同统治阿弗纳斯！

description.original: I may have broken my oath, but I'm stronger for it!
description.display: 我也许违背了自己的誓言，但我也因此而更加强大！

description.original: Quicker than you expected, huh?
description.display: 比你预料的更快，对吧？

description.original: I'm not scared of anything.
description.display: 我什么都不怕。

description.original: Yes, line up to fight me! I'll take you all!
description.display: 对，排好队来和我打！我要打你们所有人！

description.original: I alone can save Tiamat!
description.display: 只有我才能拯救提亚马特！

description.original: Being Tiamat's Chosen brings its own rewards.
description.display: 成为提亚马特选中的人自有其回报。

description.original: Give me a blade.
description.display: 给我一把剑。

description.original: Even a blunt blade can bash in a skull.
description.display: 哪怕是钝刀刃也是可以砸破头骨的。

description.original: Ah, a freshly sharpened axe. What more does a guy need?
description.display: 啊，崭新的锋利战斧。得斧如此，夫复何求？

description.original: The craftsmanship is exquisite.
description.display: 这做工真是超凡入圣。

description.original: A magical axe of extreme power. My enemies flee in fear when they see it.
description.display: 这是一把蕴含着惊人力量的魔法斧头。敌人见到它时都会鸡飞狗走。

description.original: A crude symbol, but any reverence to Tiamat is a good thing.
description.display: 很简陋的圣徽，但任何向提亚马特的供奉都是好事。

description.original: A well crafted symbol, though it lacks a certain finesse.
description.display: 做工精细的圣徽，但还是缺乏了些技艺。

description.original: Forged in the dragonflame for only the most devout followers.
description.display: 这是用龙焰铸造而成的，只有最虔诚的信徒才配拥有它。

description.original: I've foresworn my paladin oaths and dedicated my life to serving Tiamat.
description.display: 我决心放弃圣武士的誓言，将我的一生奉献给提亚马特。

description.original: Should probably get this tightened up. The noise is very distracting.
description.display: 得想办法把它绑紧。这噪音实在是太烦人了。

description.original: Good for bashing down doors and breaking through walls.
description.display: 适合用来撞门或破墙而入。

description.original: I'll impale the heads of my enemies on these spikes! Hah hah hah!
description.display: 可以将敌人的头颅穿在尖刺上！哈哈哈哈！

description.original: Forged from obsidian and granted to me by the Dragon Queen herself.
description.display: 这是采用黑曜石铸造而成，并由龙女王亲自赠送给我的礼物。

description.original: It may be flimsy, but you still wouldn't want to get bashed by it.
description.display: 虽然很薄弱，但是被它盾击还是很要命的。

description.original: Don't let appearances deceive you. This is a sturdy, well-crafted shield.
description.display: 别让它的外表所迷惑。这是个牢固的精良护盾。

description.original: Blessed by the Cult of the Dragon and carried into battle against their enemies.
description.display: 这是受过龙巫教赐福的护盾，它对抗过无数龙巫教的敌人。

description.original: Crafted from the scales of Tiamat's enemies and worn by her unholy Paladin followers.
description.display: 这是采用提亚马特的阵亡敌人的鳞片打造而成的护盾，由女神的邪恶圣武士信徒所使用。

description.original: Whatever is in it won't be in it for long!
description.display: 无论里头装的是什么，很快就会流失一空！

description.original: A sturdy vial containing a murky, greyish liquid.
description.display: 这个坚固的瓶子中盛着污浊的灰色液体。

description.original: A crystal vial with a finely crafted silver stopper.
description.display: 这个水晶瓶子附带着一个精美的银质瓶塞。

description.original: Filled to the brim with unholy power.
description.display: 里头蕴含着满满的邪恶力量。

description.original: Reserved for only the most bad-ass warriors.
description.display: 只有最狠的战士才有资格佩戴它。

description.original: Mere child's play. Bring me a real choker.
description.display: 小儿科。给我来个真正有能耐的贴颈项链。

description.original: A golden wreath of thorns worn about ones neck.
description.display: 佩戴在脖子上的黄金带刺花圈。

description.original: Grants me control over a beast of my choosing. I chose Chango.
description.display: 可以让我使唤一头猛兽。我选择了昌戈。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Male Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Dragonborn Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a CON score of 13 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a EVIL alignment

character_sheet_details.backstory: Arkhan the Cruel is a dragonborn oathbreaker paladin in the service of the five-headed dragon goddess Tiamat. Due to 'The Wreath of the Prism' that he wears around his neck, he has gained control of the vicious manticore Chango.
残暴者阿克汉是一位龙裔破誓者圣武士，为五头龙女神提亚马特效忠。由于脖子上戴着的“棱镜花环”，他获得了对邪恶蝎尾狮昌戈的控制。

original.name: Tiamat's Fury
original.description: Arkhan attacks the closest enemy with the fury of Tiamat.

display.name: 提亚马特之怒
display.description: 阿克汉使用提亚马特之怒攻击距离最近的敌人。

original.name: Flame Breath
original.description: Arkhan breaths deadly dragon fire on a cone of enemies.
original.long_description: Arkhan rushes forward to the nearest enemy and breaths dragon fire on them and all enemies in a large cone.

display.name: 烈焰呼吸
display.description: 阿克汉对锥形范围的敌人喷吐致命龙息。
display.long_description: 阿克汉快速冲向距离最近的敌人，并向其身后锥形大范围内所有敌人喷吐龙息。

original.name: Rage of the Dragonborn
original.tip_text: Arkhan attacks more ferociously when there are more enemies attacking him. Place him in your front line!

display.name: 龙裔之怒
display.tip_text: 更多阿克汉的敌人越多，他的攻击就越凶残。将他放置在你的前线！

original.name: Bulk Up
original.specialization_description: Arkhan increases the effect of formation abilities affecting him through sheer force of will.
original.tip_text: Arkhan increases the affect of formation abilities targeting him. Buff him up to take advantage of this effect!

display.name: 严阵以待
display.specialization_description: 阿克汉通过纯粹的意志力来强化影响他的阵型技能效果。
display.tip_text: 阿克汉会强化以他为目标的阵型技能效果。充分利用这个效果为他施加增益！

original.name: Usurped Power
original.specialization_description: Arkhan taps into the power of Tiamat to "borrow" formation abilities affecting other Champions adjacent to him.
original.tip_text: Arkhan is also affected by some formation abilities affecting champions adjacent to him. Build your formation accordingly.

display.name: 篡夺力量
display.specialization_description: 阿克汉利用提亚马特的力量“借用”影响其身边其他勇士的阵型技能。
display.tip_text: 某些影响阿克汉身边勇士的阵型技能也会影响到他，请据此构建你的阵型。

original.name: Tavern Brawler
original.description: Only four to deal with? I only work in fives.

display.name: 旅店打手
display.description: 只有四个人？至少五个人才够我打。

original.name: Grappler
original.description: Chango, hold them down so I can chop off their arm!

display.name: 擒抱者
display.description: 昌戈，按住他们，我来砍断他们的胳膊！

original.name: Tough
original.description: Nobody scratches Arkhan the Cruel!

display.name: 坚韧
display.description: 没人能伤残暴者阿克汉一根汗毛！

original.name: Resilient
original.description: I may have broken my oath, but I'm stronger for it!

display.name: 韧性
display.description: 我也许违背了自己的誓言，但我也因此而更加强大！

original.name: Nimble
original.description: Quicker than you expected, huh?

display.name: 敏捷
display.description: 比你预料的更快，对吧？

original.name: Defensive Duelist
original.description: I'm not scared of anything.

display.name: 防守型决斗者
display.description: 我什么都不怕。

original.name: Calm Under Pressure
original.description: Yes, line up to fight me! I'll take you all!

display.name: 从容应对
display.description: 对，排好队来和我打！我要打你们所有人！

original.name: Hand of Vecna
original.description: With this hand, I shall rule Avernus with my queen at my side!

display.name: 维克那之手
display.description: 有了这只手，我将和我的皇后共同统治阿弗纳斯！

original.name: Chosen of Tiamat
original.description: I alone can save Tiamat!

display.name: 提亚马特的选择
display.description: 只有我才能拯救提亚马特！

original.name: Mask of the Dragon Queen
original.description: Being Tiamat's Chosen brings its own rewards.

display.name: 龙女王的面具
display.description: 成为提亚马特选中的人自有其回报。

original.name: Weapon Master
original.description: Give me a blade.

display.name: 武器大师
display.description: 给我一把剑。

original.name: Dull Battle Axe
original.description: Even a blunt blade can bash in a skull.

display.name: 迟钝的战斧
display.description: 哪怕是钝刀刃也是可以砸破头骨的。

original.name: Sharp Battle Axe
original.description: Ah, a freshly sharpened axe. What more does a guy need?

display.name: 锋利的战斧
display.description: 啊，崭新的锋利战斧。得斧如此，夫复何求？

original.name: Cruel Battle Axe
original.description: The craftsmanship is exquisite.

display.name: 残忍的战斧
display.description: 这做工真是超凡入圣。

original.name: Fane-Eater
original.description: A magical axe of extreme power. My enemies flee in fear when they see it.

display.name: 神殿吞噬者
display.description: 这是一把蕴含着惊人力量的魔法斧头。敌人见到它时都会鸡飞狗走。

original.name: Crude Symbol
original.description: A crude symbol, but any reverence to Tiamat is a good thing.

display.name: 粗糙的圣徽
display.description: 很简陋的圣徽，但任何向提亚马特的供奉都是好事。

original.name: Steel Symbol
original.description: A well crafted symbol, though it lacks a certain finesse.

display.name: 钢质圣徽
display.description: 做工精细的圣徽，但还是缺乏了些技艺。

original.name: Flame Forged Symbol
original.description: Forged in the dragonflame for only the most devout followers.

display.name: 火铸圣徽
display.description: 这是用龙焰铸造而成的，只有最虔诚的信徒才配拥有它。

original.name: Holy Symbol of Tiamat
original.description: I've foresworn my paladin oaths and dedicated my life to serving Tiamat.

display.name: 华丽的提亚马特圣徽
display.description: 我决心放弃圣武士的誓言，将我的一生奉献给提亚马特。

original.name: Clanking Pauldron
original.description: Should probably get this tightened up. The noise is very distracting.

display.name: 锒铛作响的大锅
display.description: 得想办法把它绑紧。这噪音实在是太烦人了。

original.name: Solid Pauldron
original.description: Good for bashing down doors and breaking through walls.

display.name: 坚固的大锅
display.description: 适合用来撞门或破墙而入。

original.name: Spiked Pauldron
original.description: I'll impale the heads of my enemies on these spikes! Hah hah hah!

display.name: 带刺的大锅
display.description: 可以将敌人的头颅穿在尖刺上！哈哈哈哈！

original.name: Pauldron of the Dragonmother
original.description: Forged from obsidian and granted to me by the Dragon Queen herself.

display.name: 龙母大锅
display.description: 这是采用黑曜石铸造而成，并由龙女王亲自赠送给我的礼物。

original.name: Flimsy Shield
original.description: It may be flimsy, but you still wouldn't want to get bashed by it.

display.name: 薄弱的护盾
display.description: 虽然很薄弱，但是被它盾击还是很要命的。

original.name: Strong Shield
original.description: Don't let appearances deceive you. This is a sturdy, well-crafted shield.

display.name: 强大的盾牌
display.description: 别让它的外表所迷惑。这是个牢固的精良护盾。

original.name: Dragon-Blessed Shield
original.description: Blessed by the Cult of the Dragon and carried into battle against their enemies.

display.name: 龙佑之盾
display.description: 这是受过龙巫教赐福的护盾，它对抗过无数龙巫教的敌人。

original.name: Dragonscale Shield of the Unholy
original.description: Crafted from the scales of Tiamat's enemies and worn by her unholy Paladin followers.

display.name: 邪恶龙鳞盾
display.description: 这是采用提亚马特的阵亡敌人的鳞片打造而成的护盾，由女神的邪恶圣武士信徒所使用。

original.name: Cracked Vial
original.description: Whatever is in it won't be in it for long!

display.name: 破裂的小瓶子
display.description: 无论里头装的是什么，很快就会流失一空！

original.name: Sturdy Vial
original.description: A sturdy vial containing a murky, greyish liquid.

display.name: 坚固的小瓶子
display.description: 这个坚固的瓶子中盛着污浊的灰色液体。

original.name: Crystal Vial
original.description: A crystal vial with a finely crafted silver stopper.

display.name: 水晶小瓶子
display.description: 这个水晶瓶子附带着一个精美的银质瓶塞。

original.name: Vial of Unholy Water
original.description: Filled to the brim with unholy power.

display.name: 邪水
display.description: 里头蕴含着满满的邪恶力量。

original.name: Rusty Choker
original.description: Reserved for only the most bad-ass warriors.

display.name: 腐蚀的贴颈项链
display.description: 只有最狠的战士才有资格佩戴它。

original.name: Spiked Choker
original.description: Mere child's play. Bring me a real choker.

display.name: 带刺的贴颈项链
display.description: 小儿科。给我来个真正有能耐的贴颈项链。

original.name: Golden Wreath
original.description: A golden wreath of thorns worn about ones neck.

display.name: 黄金花圈
display.description: 佩戴在脖子上的黄金带刺花圈。

original.name: Wreath of the Prism
original.description: Grants me control over a beast of my choosing. I chose Chango.

display.name: 棱晶花圈
display.description: 可以让我使唤一头猛兽。我选择了昌戈。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Male Champions by $(amount)%
使所有男性勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Dragonborn Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位龙裔勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有魅力大于等于 13 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a CON score of 13 or higher in the formation
阵型中每有一位体质大于等于 13 的勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a EVIL alignment
阵型中每有一位邪恶阵营勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
